title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
